top_signals.title: Anthropic to offer EU access to its advanced Mythos model
top_signals.summary: Anthropic is sharing access to its most advanced AI model, Mythos, with the EU after the bloc sought permission over cybersecurity concerns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
